feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: New PA is not visible V_001P_N
entry.content:
i have created a new PA which is showing in T500P and T001P but this new PA is not visible to update PSG grouping for WS (V_001P_N). Eventually not showing in V_001P_ALL 

This PA is created under IMG path PA> PSA  > Assignment of PA to company code. Also This company code is enabled in T500L table 

Please help

entry.title: Extensibility cockpit
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

I try to set up the approval possibility in my Manage My Timesheet app (F1823) with activated scope item 1Q4 Time Recording. 
The Timesheet Approver option can be added via Extensibility Cockpit app (F2866) where I found Business Context HCM_CATS_V1_APPROVER_DETRMN HCM: Timesheet Approver Determination with which I can create a Custom logic and implement this Timesheet Approver functionality into my system. 
My question is, will I activate any more scope item (like SuccessFactors (HR) module) with this BADI extensibility? Or is it free and safe to use? 

Thank you

entry.title: export Cats_da to CSV file
entry.content:
Hi all

i want to create a background  job that export Cats_da job to CSV. how do i do that?

entry.title: Hi, Can restrict portlet edit access using business rule
entry.content:
There are two custom MDF portlets - GMC & Dependent

I want to restrict dependent portlet

The dependent portlet itself needs to create a start date and end date, once these dates are initiated by ABC group, that particular period only employees have access to Dependent portlet edit access.

Note : ABC group people only have initiating start date and end date access, filed should not visible to others.

Under GMC portlet, there is field GMC coverage - if yes then Emp have access only can add 3 Dependent if not only 2 dependent access. like Add dependent child associates need to be restrict.

entry.title: SAP ECC HCM authorisation object P_PERNR with PSIGN = E not working after SP 608/132?
entry.content:
Hi,
we've seen the following behaviour:
Authorisations on Object P_PERNR with PSIGN E (exclude own Personnel Number) are no longer working.
The very same roles have worked well before the support patch level had been increased to 608/132.
Now the access to respective data for the user's own record is erroneously given.
The error seems to happen in method process_only_partial_checks in CL_HRPAD00AUTH_CHECK_STD 

Does anybody else have that problem or even a solution for it?

entry.title: Re: HCM Processes & Forms: record several data records wi...
entry.content:
Problem solved 🙂 
In the end, it's relatively simple.

You only need to fill the HRASR_IS_MULT_PA field with an 'X' as a manual default value, we used the TC HRASR_DT for this and set the Field up in the Back-End Service SAP_PA. THis makes it possible to enter several entries using a table, The Field does not have to be displayed in the Form, i.e. it can be set invisible. The data binding for this field would be typing:BOOLE_D.



And in the Field Metadata you can set this Field up like that:

In the end it can look like this: 

I hope this is helpful 🙂

entry.title: Latest goals management - Introduction description default expansion
entry.content: In the latest goals management, there is an "introduction" button which you have to click to expand to see the description of either your individual scorecard or development tiles. Is there a way to have it display in the expanded view by default?

entry.title: Storing Employee Diversity & Equity Data without Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently collecting Diversity, Equity & Inclusion data from our applicants (on the application) and our employees (in custom portlets in the People Profile). We are looking to determine if there's an alternative to custom portlets for the employee data. Our questions include Gender Identity, Indigenous Community, Visible Minority, and Ethnicity.

Where are other companies (who don't have Employee Central) storing this data?

Thanks!

entry.title: LMS Implementation Plan
entry.content: I have a customer that would like an "example of an Implementation Plan for LMS?" Are you able to point me to where that information can be found? Thanks!

entry.title: Unpaid leave amount not showing for certain employee group
entry.content:
Good day,

I have an issue whereby an unpaid marternity leave wage type is configured but when doing payroll simulation, the amount for the unpaid leave taken is showing for certain employee subgroup but not for another. What am I missing? I have attached screenshots showing the difference on payslip.

entry.title: Rehire visibility for change in legal entity
entry.content:
Hello

I would like to understand how you have managed the rehire process whereby it is required due to a change in legal entity.

Where we rehire an employee into a different company, we require a new employee number to trigger various actions for HMRC.  We would like for the employee to have visibility of their old record (and subsequent payslips), how have you managed this?  

Thanks

entry.title: GRC HR Trigger considers all Plugin system for Change/Termination Access Requests
entry.content:
Dear Gurus/Experts,

We have GRC AC 12.0 HR Trigger Standard Functionality Implemented in the system and have multiple plugin systems, we are using GRC->AC->Maintain AC Apps & BRF+ Func. Mapping HR Trigger function. GRC is working fine for Action "New Hire" (New user to system and mapping of Roles as per position), whereas in termination/change of employee cases, Action "Terminate" OR "Change" employee. GRC considers again all of the plugin system for Access Request, result of which requests are reaching Escape Route since user does not always exist in all Plugin systems.

What can be done so that GRC will only consider systems as per position mapping OR where user exists for Termination/Change employee Actions?

Note: We know its necessary, but all the config details cannot be added here. Let me know if you can point out the required one, I should provide.

Thanks in Advance!

Thanks

entry.title: Date . . contains invalid character ,infotype 2 is incorrect in slg1 .
entry.content:
While Integrating  the employee data from SF to S4Hana , for only few employee the errors are popping  in the SLG1 transaction, stating that the the " Date .. contains invalid character and info type 2 is incorrect . Kindly help on the above.

 

Thanks & Regards .

entry.title: cross tab and non aggregated tab in story reports table
entry.content:
what is cross tab and non aggregated tab in story reports table. In which scenario's do we use it ?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: What are SAP SF AI Features?. SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Is there any learning path or roadmap for SF AI features or those are just the inbuilt AI-enhanced features in the SF Talent Modules that are to be enabled as per requirements?

Thanks

entry.title: Client level number range task
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task to check the client-level number range assignment. For example, a company XYZ has 19 entities, from A to S. The requirement is that when Company A hires an employee, the personnel number should be 1. If Company B hires an employee, the personnel number should be 2, and so on. This numbering process should also apply to organizational objects, such as position, job, and task. Could you guide me on how to set up this configuration in SAP HCM?

Regards,

Anna

entry.title: Possibilities of Cost Center
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task involving an employee who works for different organizations. The requirement is to assign cost centers from different companies with specific percentages, meaning 30% of the cost will be covered by Company A, 65% by Company B, and 5% by Company C. Could you guide me on how to configure this in SAP HCM?

Regards,

entry.title: PA_SE_IN please could you advise when the latest pack will be released
entry.content:
We would like to do support pack upgrades with the latest PA_SE_IN. when does this get released. also the last versions of 

SFIHCM01

SFIHCM02

SFIHCM03

entry.title: Regarding HR module
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We are implementing FI, SD , MM  modules by using Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud)  for one of our clients. This is migration project where we are migrating from ECC system to S4 HANA.

Now our client wants to implement HR modules which will be suitable with Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud) therefore need your assistance.

  1. Can we add HR module with Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud)?
  2. Do we need to pay separate license cost ?
  3. What is the different between Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud) and successfcators?

Thank You, 

Rini Mukherjee 

+91-9038870937

entry.title: Help needed in HR forms WT1000 (Working hours) cumulating please!
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am stuck in an implementation where I am working on how the payslip shows wage type 1000 data. In Forms it gets cumulated into single line. Business expects it to come as individual lines i.e., for each date. In RT table it comes as single lines, but in form it is coming as single line. I already changed V_512W_D PC30 value to 0.

Tcode: PC00_M08_CALC_SIMU 

Below are entries of RT table:

There are two entries for current period in RT table as below (Wagetype 1000):

 total (8 + 5 = 13)

Same for previous period(retro) it also has two entry:

total (8 + 3 = 11)

But when form is displayed it gets added as single line, see below:

 

PS: I dont have much idea about hrforms. Kindly help as this is urgent.

Thanks,

Rahul
